arg.name: robot_name
arg.description: TurtleBot name printed on the robot

executable.cmd: bash -lc 'printf "%s\n" "$(var robot_name)" | robot-setup.sh && ros2 run reactive_robot reactive_controller'
bash -lc 'printf "%s\n" "$(var robot_name)" | robot-setup.sh && ros2 run teleop_twist_keyboard teleop_twist_keyboard --ros-args -p stamped:=true --remap /cmd_vel:=/teleop_cmd_vel'
bash -lc 'printf "%s\n" "$(var robot_name)" | robot-setup.sh && ros2 launch turtlebot4_navigation slam.launch.py'
bash -lc 'printf "%s\n" "$(var robot_name)" | robot-setup.sh && ros2 launch turtlebot4_viz view_robot.launch.py'
